reviews.comment:
Buena atención en Full,muy amable....para el cambio de aceite tuve que esperar,a pesar  que tenía turno....el resto bien....baños limpios....se respeta el protocolo por el covid.

(Translated by Google)
Good service at Full, very friendly....I had to wait for the oil change, even though I had an appointment....everything else was fine....clean bathrooms....they respect the Covid protocol.

reviews.comment:
Que en mismo lugar haya servicio de cafetería y minutas con tanto verde. Y me sorprendió la variedad de opciones TACC.  Quienes atienden son muy amables y hacen cumplir los protocolos. Ah! Y espectaculares las medialunas.

(Translated by Google)
That there's a cafeteria and snacks in the same place, with so much greenery. And I was surprised by the variety of gluten-free options. The staff are very friendly and enforce the protocols. Oh! And the croissants are spectacular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdzUyalhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Como siempre  muyyyy limpios los  sanitarios. Uso el de discapacitados y  muy  bien el cuidado y el aseo . Con  pspel higiénico barras de  sostén inodoro adecuado pileta limpia jabón liquido para manos. Papel para secarse  y también aire para secarse.  Mi calificación es  10. Había un market para comprar y dos bancos para sentarse a la sombra
Muy bien cuidado todo.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the restrooms are very clean. I used the accessible restroom, and it was very well maintained and clean. It had a toilet paper holder, grab bars, a proper toilet, a clean sink, liquid hand soap, paper towels, and an air conditioner. My rating is 10. There was a market for shopping and two benches to sit in the shade.
Everything was very well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbmUteU13EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta estación es un desperdício... esta en una ubicación inmejorable, con un espacio de locos para hacer un lugar super agradable y la tienen medio abandonada. La atención si bien no es mala, los pibes le ponen toda la onda, hay 2 personas para 5 maquinas y la espera para cargar es eterna. Además todas las semanas tienen horarios que solo cobran efectivo, aludiendo que no tienen sistema. Ni Mercado Pago, ni tarjeta débito...

(Translated by Google)
This station is a waste... it's in a prime location, with tons of space to make it a really nice place, and it's practically abandoned. The service isn't bad, the staff are really helpful, but there are only two people for five machines, and the wait to recharge is endless. Plus, every week they only accept cash at certain times, claiming their system is down. No Mercado Pago, no debit cards...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbmJDRk5BEAE
